# `nise dotfiles`

- **Usage**: `nise dotfiles <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/dotfiles/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/dotfiles/mod.rs)

[experimental] Manage dotfiles from `[dotfiles]`

Dotfiles are config files symlinked, copied, or rendered to target paths,
plus marker-delimited blocks or single lines in files nise doesn't own.
Unlike `[tools]`, dotfiles are only acted on when explicitly requested with
`nise dotfiles apply`, `nise bootstrap dotfiles apply`, or `nise bootstrap`.

## Subcommands

- [`nise dotfiles add [FLAGS] <TARGET>…`](/cli/dotfiles/add.md)
- [`nise dotfiles apply [FLAGS] [TARGET]…`](/cli/dotfiles/apply.md)
- [`nise dotfiles edit [FLAGS] <TARGET>`](/cli/dotfiles/edit.md)
- [`nise dotfiles status [-J --json] [--missing] [TARGET]…`](/cli/dotfiles/status.md)
